home.intro:
I am a Robotics and Automation Engineer passionate about creating innovative solutions. Skilled in PLCs, robotics programming, and software development. I enjoy solving challenges and making technology smarter.
My goal is to keep growing as an engineer and contribute to impactful projects.

experiences.description: Research and development in mobile robotics • Control algorithms development • Master's degree research
Programming collaborative robots (Universal Robots) • Robotic system development with ROS2 and C++ • Innovation projects for manufacturing line supply

Software integration (C#/.NET) • Beckhoff TwinCAT 3 PLC programming • Sensopart vision system integration • SQL Server database management • MQTT communication & Mosquitto Broker for PLC-HMI integration

academic.bachelor: Bachelor’s in Industrial Electronics and Computers Engineering
academic.master: Master’s in Control, Automation and Robotics

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Each project represents countless hours of problem-solving and that magical moment when the robot finally does what it was supposed to do.

items.title: Assembly Machines Programming
items.description: Automation and control logic development for complex assembly machines, including PLC programming and HMI integration.

items.title: Climate Screening Software
items.description: Development of automated screening software for climate chamber testing, featuring data acquisition systems and real-time process monitoring.

items.title: Depalletizer Solution
items.description: Implementation of a depalletizing solution using a Universal Robots UR10 collaborative robot to optimize production line supply.

items.title: Master’s Thesis - Navigation Control
items.description: Development of navigation control and docking maneuvers for autonomous mobile manipulators (KUKA KMR iiwa) in logistics environments.

items.title: Autonomous Underwater Glider
items.description: Development of an autonomous underwater glider designed for short-range data collection and environmental monitoring.

items.title: First Portfolio
items.description: Initial web development project focused on fundamental concepts of responsive design and UI/UX basics using core web technologies.

contact.title: Get in
contact.subtitle: Interested in industrial automation or software engineering? Let's connect.
